$comment: Extends action-envelope.schema.json from execution-boundary-core-spec commit d3e239b. Core fields are not modified.
title: TransportActionEnvelope
description: Transport-layer extension of ActionEnvelope. Adds transport-specific fields. Core fields are inherited and unchanged.

action_id.description: Inherited from Core Spec. Unique identifier for this action instance.

action_type.description: Inherited from Core Spec. SHOULD be 'transport.send' or a namespaced variant such as 'transport.iso8583.forward'.

resource.description: Inherited from Core Spec. Target resource identifier. For transport, this is typically the destination endpoint.

parameters.description: Inherited from Core Spec. Transport-specific parameters (e.g. headers, message fields).

context_hash.description: Inherited from Core Spec. Hash of execution context at proposal time.

timestamp.description: Inherited from Core Spec. ISO 8601 timestamp of when the action was proposed.

destination.description: Target endpoint. Format is transport-specific. Examples: '192.168.1.1:8583', 'https://api.example.com/endpoint', 'orders.topic'.

payload_size.description: Byte length of the payload at proposal time. null if unavailable.

protocol_version.description: Protocol version string. null if not applicable. Examples: 'HTTP/1.1', 'ISO-8583-1987'.

direction.description: outbound: gateway initiates send to upstream. inbound: gateway receives and forwards inward.
